About Tyler

The person behind the practice

"I do not believe in one-size-fits-all massage. If I am not adjusting to what I feel under my hands, I am not doing my job."

At a Glance

  • Licensed Massage Therapist
  • Deep Tissue Specialist
  • Sports & Recovery Certified
  • Swedish & Relaxation

Modalities

  • Deep Tissue
  • Swedish
  • Sports Massage
  • Myofascial Release
  • Trigger Point Therapy

How it started

Tyler did not take the typical path into massage therapy. Before getting licensed, he spent years dealing with his own chronic pain and frustration with practitioners who ran the same routine regardless of what was actually going on. That experience shaped everything about how he works today.

He went through a rigorous training program, got licensed, and immediately started building a practice around one idea: every session should be different because every body is different.

Your body already knows what it needs. Tyler's job is to listen to it and respond with the right technique at the right intensity.

The approach

Tyler starts every new client relationship with a conversation - not a clipboard. He wants to know what hurts, what your day looks like, how you sleep, what you have already tried. That context matters as much as the hands-on work.

During the session, he adapts in real time. If a muscle releases faster than expected, he moves on instead of grinding into it. If he finds something unexpected, he will let you know and ask before changing course. It is collaborative, not scripted.

Beyond the table

Tyler also gives clients practical guidance to extend the benefits between sessions - stretches, posture adjustments, simple movement habits. The goal is not to make you dependent on weekly visits. It is to help your body hold onto the progress you are making.

Most of Tyler's clients come from referrals. That says more than any marketing copy ever could.

Tyler's Philosophy

Listen First

Every session starts with understanding what is going on in your body - not running a preset routine.

Adapt in Real Time

Pressure, technique, and focus areas shift based on what Tyler feels during the session. Your body leads.

Build Toward Independence

The best outcome is a client who needs fewer sessions over time - not more. Tyler gives you tools to keep improving.

Experience the difference yourself

Browse Tyler's massage packages and pick the one that fits your needs.

View Packages & Pricing

Professional massage therapy - deep tissue, Swedish, sports, and custom sessions. Licensed, local, and focused on lasting results.
